name: Fortinet FortiSASE
description: Fortinet FortiSASE REST API for managing SWG policies, security profiles, web filtering, SD-WAN, and remote user management

auth_config.note: Uses FortiCloud API token or FortiSASE admin credentials

actions.name: List SWG Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all Secure Web Gateway policies configured in FortiSASE

actions.name: Create SWG Policy
actions.description: Create a new Secure Web Gateway policy for traffic filtering and inspection

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: SWG policy including name, action (accept/deny), source users/groups, URL categories, web filter profile, and SSL inspection profile

actions.name: List Security Profiles
actions.description: Retrieve all security profiles (antivirus, IPS, web filter, DNS filter)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Profile type: antivirus, webfilter, dnsfilter, ips, applicationcontrol

actions.name: Get Web Filter Profile
actions.description: Retrieve a specific web filter profile with category settings

parameters.name: profile_name
parameters.description: Name of the web filter profile

actions.name: List URL Filters
actions.description: Retrieve all custom URL filter entries for blocking or allowing URLs

actions.name: Create URL Filter
actions.description: Create a URL filter entry to block or allow a specific URL pattern

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: URL filter entry including url, type (simple/regex/wildcard), and action (allow/block/monitor)

actions.name: List Remote Users
actions.description: Retrieve all remote users connected to FortiSASE

actions.name: Get DNS Filter Profile
actions.description: Retrieve a DNS filter profile with domain category and block settings

parameters.name: profile_name
parameters.description: Name of the DNS filter profile

actions.name: Get System Status
actions.description: Retrieve FortiSASE system status, licensing, and service health
